1. FormalConjectures/Util/ for any graph-related utilities
2. FormalConjectures/ForMathlib/ for any graph coloring or choosability definitions
3. Any other Erdos problem files that deal with graph coloring or choosability concepts
4. Mathlib imports related to SimpleGraph coloring

Search for keywords: choosab, colorab, listcolor, ABChoos, Finset, SimpleGraph, coloring, chromatic. Report what you find.

    20â†’# Erdإ‘s Problem 629

    22â†’*Reference:* [erdosproblems.com/629](https://www.erdosproblems.com/629)
    23â†’
    24â†’Determine the minimal number of vertices $n(k)$ of a bipartite graph $G$ such that
    25â†’the list chromatic number $\chi_L(G) > k$.
    26â†’
    27â†’A problem of Erdإ‘s, Rubin, and Taylor [ERT80], who proved that
    28â†’$2^{k-1} < n(k) < k^2 \cdot 2^{k+2}$
    29â†’and $n(2) = 6$. Hanson, MacGillivray, and Toft [HMT96] proved $n(3) = 14$.
    30â†’
    31â†’[ERT80] Erdإ‘s, P., Rubin, A. L., and Taylor, H., _Choosability in graphs_,
    32â†’Proc. West Coast Conf. on Combinatorics, Graph Theory and Computing,
    33â†’Congressus Numerantium XXVI (1980), 125-157.
    34â†’
    35â†’[HMT96] Hanson, D., MacGillivray, G., and Toft, B., _Choosability of bipartite graphs_,

    51â†’where each vertex receives a list of at least $k$ colors, there exists a
    52â†’proper list coloring. -/

    54â†’  âˆ€ L : V â†’ Finset â„•, (âˆ€ v, k â‰¤ (L v).card) â†’

    24â†’Erdإ‘s, Rubin, and Taylor asked whether every planar bipartite graph is 3-choosable

    37â†’
    38â†’/-- A proper list coloring of $G$ with respect to a list assignment $L : V \to \text{Finset}\ \mathbb{N}$
    39â†’is a function $f : V \to \mathbb{N}$ such that $f(v) \in L(v)$ for all $v$, and $f(u) \neq f(v)$

    44â†’
    45â†’/-- A graph $G$ is $k$-choosable ($k$-list-colorable) if for every list assignment $L$
    46â†’where each vertex receives a list of at least $k$ colors, there exists a
    47â†’proper list coloring. -/
    48â†’def IsChoosable {V : Type*} (G : SimpleGraph V) (k : â„•) : Prop :=
    49â†’  âˆ€ L : V â†’ Finset â„•, (âˆ€ v, k â‰¤ (L v).card) â†’
    50â†’    âˆƒ f : V â†’ â„•, IsProperListColoring G L f

    56â†’
    57â†’/-- A graph is planar if it can be embedded in the plane without edge crossings.
